final:
// // This is a 3-bit down-counter with an asynchronous active-high reset and disable signal. The counter decrements its value on each clock cycle when disabled.
module up_counter (
    input clk,
    input reset_n,
    input enable,
    output reg [2:0] count
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (!reset_n) begin
        count <= 3'b000;
    end else if (enable) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This is a 3-bit down-counter with an asynchronous active-high reset and disable signal. The counter decrements its value on each clock cycle when disabled.
